Document Title: Vendor Risk Assessment Template – Kahana Oasis
Version: 1.0
Effective Date: March 2026
Owner: Security Lead / Compliance Lead
Approved By: CTO / CEO

Purpose:
Use this template to assess each vendor that stores, processes, transmits, or can affect Kahana or customer data/services. This supports SOC 2 vendor risk and subservice oversight requirements.

Instructions:
- Complete one copy per vendor.
- High/Critical vendors require Security + leadership review.
- Link supporting evidence (SOC reports, DPAs, contracts, reviews).

1) Vendor Profile
| Field | Value |
|------|-------|
| Vendor Name | |
| Vendor Category (Cloud/Auth/Analytics/AI/Payments/etc.) | |
| Kahana Vendor Owner (internal) | |
| Primary Vendor Contact (name/email) | |
| Service Description | |
| In Use Since | |
| Status (New / Existing / Offboarding) | |
| Critical Vendor? (Y/N) | |

2) Kahana-Specific Critical Vendor Reference
Use as a baseline for known critical vendors in current architecture:
- AWS (compute/networking/storage, us-east-1)
- Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, backend APIs)
- Stripe (payments)
- Mixpanel (analytics/telemetry)
- Google Gemini / Deepgram (AI services)
- Okta (enterprise SSO integration, where used)

3) Data Use and Access Scope
| Question | Response |
|----------|----------|
| What data classification level does the vendor handle? (None/Internal/Confidential/Restricted) | |
| Does vendor process customer data? (Y/N; describe) | |
| Does vendor process personal data? (Y/N; type, region) | |
| Does vendor process AI prompt/interaction data? (Y/N; describe) | |
| Does vendor have production/admin access or control plane influence? (Y/N; explain) | |
| Is data residency relevant? (Y/N; location) | |

4) Security and Compliance Due Diligence
| Question | Response |
|----------|----------|
| SOC 2 / SOC 1 / ISO 27001 or equivalent available? (Y/N; links) | |
| Most recent report/cert date and coverage period | |
| Information security program documented? (Y/N; summary/link) | |
| Incident response plan documented? (Y/N) | |
| BC/DR plan documented? (Y/N) | |
| Any material exceptions/findings relevant to Kahana use case? | |

5) Technical Control Review
| Question | Response |
|----------|----------|
| Data encrypted in transit (TLS)? | |
| Data encrypted at rest? | |
| MFA for vendor admin access? | |
| RBAC / least privilege controls? | |
| Logging/monitoring of security-relevant events? | |
| Vulnerability management and patch process? | |
| Backup/restore controls (if vendor stores critical data)? | |

6) Privacy and Legal Review
| Question | Response |
|----------|----------|
| Privacy policy reviewed? (link) | |
| DPA required for this use case? (Y/N) | |
| DPA in place? (Y/N; date/link) | |
| NDA/MSA in place? (Y/N; date/link) | |
| Security incident notification obligations in contract? (Y/N; timeline) | |
| Sub-processor disclosure available? (Y/N; link) | |
| Data deletion/export process documented? (Y/N) | |

7) Operational and Incident History
| Question | Response |
|----------|----------|
| SLA/uptime commitments relevant to Kahana? | |
| Known incidents in last 24 months? (Y/N; summary) | |
| Security contact/escalation path available? (Y/N; details) | |
| Any unresolved concerns requiring compensating controls? | |

8) Risk Scoring (1-3 per category)
Scoring:
- 1 = Low Risk
- 2 = Medium Risk
- 3 = High Risk

| Category | Score (1-3) | Notes |
|----------|-------------|-------|
| Criticality to Kahana service delivery | | |
| Data sensitivity handled | | |
| Access/control over production paths | | |
| Security assurance maturity | | |
| Technical control strength | | |
| Privacy/legal posture (incl. DPA readiness) | | |
| Incident history / operational reliability | | |
| **Total Score** | | |

Suggested thresholds:
- 7-10: Low
- 11-15: Medium
- 16-21: High/Critical

9) Decision and Conditions
| Field | Value |
|------|-------|
| Overall Risk Rating (Low / Medium / High / Critical) | |
| Decision (Approve / Conditionally Approve / Reject) | |
| Required Conditions / Mitigations Before Approval | |
| Residual Risk After Conditions | |
| Reassessment Cadence (at least annual for Medium+ vendors) | |

10) Approvals
| Role | Name | Date | Signature/Approval Ref |
|------|------|------|------------------------|
| Vendor Owner | | | |
| Security / Compliance Reviewer | | | |
| Legal Reviewer (if required) | | | |
| CTO/CEO Approval (High/Critical) | | | |

11) Evidence Links
- SOC reports / certifications:
- DPA / MSA / NDA:
- Sub-processor list:
- Risk review notes:
- Follow-up tickets/actions:
